title: Convergence analysis shows remarkable alignment between traditional use (Ayurveda, Unani) and mod...
content: Convergence analysis shows remarkable alignment between traditional use (Ayurveda, Unani) and modern clinical evidence for ashwagandha across 6 domains: sleep, strength/vitality, stress/nervous system, sexual health, rejuvenation, and cognitive function. Even etymology validates: Latin 'somnifera'=sleep-inducing, Sanskrit 'ashwa'=horse strength. This level of cross-cultural + clinical convergence is rare and builds high confidence in traditional knowledge.
